one_line_verdict: A darkly fun genre-blender for fans of horror-comedy with a sharp cast — best saved for streaming unless you love communal scream-and-laugh energy.
english_note: Standard American English dialogue, NYC setting, no heavy accents or dense jargon — very accessible.
credits_detail: Likely features a mid-credits scene teasing a follow-up or darkly comedic button — speculative based on genre conventions and Sokolov's style.
one_line_summary: A NYC housekeeper stumbles into deadly secrets in this slick, star-studded horror-comedy.
